# Test showing callgraph doesn't connect scripttest to MCP tools it calls

# Run a simple mcpdiff command
exec mcpdiff -v testdata/trace1.json testdata/trace2.json
stdout 'Comparing traces'

# Now run callgraph on this test file itself
# First we need to compile a test binary that includes the scripttest
exec go test -c -o scripttest.test
exec callgraph -algo static scripttest.test
cp stdout callgraph_test_output.txt

# Try to find mcpdiff's main function in the call graph
# This will fail - callgraph sees the test binary but not what it executes
exec grep 'mcpdiff.*main' callgraph_test_output.txt
! stdout .

# Also try to find any connection to mcpdiff
exec grep -i 'mcpdiff' callgraph_test_output.txt  
! stdout .

# This demonstrates the fundamental limitation: 
# Standard callgraph analyzes static code, but script tests
# execute external programs dynamically
